# kSecCFErrorGuestAttributes

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a Core Foundation object containing an attribute that is unrecognized or that contains a value of the wrong type.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCFErrorGuestAttributes: CFString
```

## Discussion

This key is present when you pass a bad guest attribute to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecHostCreateGuest] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecHostSetGuestStatus] function.
title: kSecCFErrorGuestAttributes
